title: October 11
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 11''' is the 284th day of the year (285th in leap years). There are 81 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1950s#1952|1952]] – [[Jim Woodring]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Claudia Black]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Holly Fields]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 7|''Star Wars'' (1977) 7]] published. The cover date is January.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 36|''Star Wars Weekly'' 36]] published.
*[[1986]] – "[[Night of the Stranger]]" airs on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*[[2006]] – [[Legacy (2006) 4|''Legacy'' (2006) 4]] published.
*[[2016]] – [[Ahsoka (novel)|''Ahsoka'']] published.
*2016 – ''[[Star Wars Classic Paint-by-Number]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – ''[[Star Wars Battlefront II]]'' Beta ends.
*2017 – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 13|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 13]] published.
*[[2022]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian: Guide to Season Two]]'' published.
*[[2023]] – [[Dark Droids 3|''Dark Droids'' 3]] published.
*2023 – [[The Mandalorian Season 2 5|''The Mandalorian Season 2'' 5]] published.
